title: The Age of Ores
description: Minecraft mod that adds more features to Minecraft copper age update
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f33a2d1d1ddf54ae66c58fc549fd15beefba5a.png)
**_Do you think the 1.21.9 Copper Age update didn't add enough new features, Well this mod is for you
In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21.9 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update
The first update adds new Iron, gold & amethyst building blocks, it also adds tuff golem statues that can hold items _**
 

Wanna Know everything added:
